hemoglobin.meaning: Hemoglobin carries oxygen in your blood. Low levels may indicate anemia.
hemoglobin.normal_meaning: Your hemoglobin is in healthy range — good oxygen-carrying capacity.

rbc_count.meaning: Red blood cells carry oxygen. Abnormal counts affect oxygen delivery.
rbc_count.normal_meaning: Your red blood cell count is normal.

wbc_count.meaning: White blood cells fight infection. High counts may indicate infection or inflammation.
wbc_count.normal_meaning: Your white blood cell count is normal — immune system looks healthy.

platelet_count.meaning: Platelets help blood clot. Low platelets increase bleeding risk.
platelet_count.normal_meaning: Your platelet count is in healthy range.

hematocrit.meaning: Hematocrit measures the proportion of red cells in blood.

mcv.meaning: MCV measures the average size of red blood cells.
mcv.normal_meaning: Your red blood cell size is normal.

mch.meaning: MCH measures average hemoglobin per red cell.

mchc.meaning: MCHC measures hemoglobin concentration in red cells.

rdw.meaning: RDW measures variation in red cell size. High values suggest mixed cell populations.
rdw.normal_meaning: Your red cell size variation is normal.

neutrophils.meaning: Neutrophils are the primary infection-fighting white cells.

neutrophils_absolute.meaning: ANC measures actual neutrophil numbers. Low counts increase infection risk.
neutrophils_absolute.normal_meaning: Your absolute neutrophil count is normal.

lymphocytes.meaning: Lymphocytes fight viral infections and produce antibodies.

monocytes.meaning: Monocytes are part of your immune defense system.

eosinophils.meaning: Eosinophils fight parasites and are involved in allergies.

basophils.meaning: Basophils are involved in allergic reactions.

esr.meaning: ESR indicates inflammation in the body.
esr.normal_meaning: Your ESR is normal — no significant inflammation detected.

reticulocyte_count.meaning: Reticulocytes are young red cells — indicates bone marrow activity.
reticulocyte_count.normal_meaning: Your bone marrow is producing red cells normally.

sgot.meaning: SGOT is a liver enzyme. Elevated levels may indicate liver damage.
sgot.normal_meaning: Your liver enzyme SGOT is normal.

sgpt.meaning: SGPT is a liver-specific enzyme. High levels suggest liver inflammation.
sgpt.normal_meaning: Your liver enzyme SGPT is normal.

alkaline_phosphatase.meaning: ALP is found in liver and bones. High levels may indicate bile duct or bone issues.

total_bilirubin.meaning: Bilirubin is a waste product from red cell breakdown. High levels cause jaundice.
total_bilirubin.normal_meaning: Your bilirubin is normal — no jaundice risk.

direct_bilirubin.meaning: Direct bilirubin is processed by the liver.

indirect_bilirubin.meaning: Indirect bilirubin is not yet processed by liver.

total_protein.meaning: Total protein measures albumin and globulin combined.

albumin.meaning: Albumin is made by liver — maintains fluid balance and transports substances.
albumin.normal_meaning: Your albumin is normal — liver function looks good.

globulin.meaning: Globulins include antibodies and transport proteins.

ag_ratio.meaning: A/G ratio compares albumin to globulin levels.

ggt.meaning: GGT is a liver enzyme sensitive to alcohol and bile duct issues.

ldh.meaning: LDH is found in many tissues. High levels indicate tissue damage.

blood_urea.meaning: Urea is a waste product filtered by kidneys.
blood_urea.normal_meaning: Your kidney function for urea clearance is normal.

bun.meaning: BUN measures nitrogen from urea in blood.

creatinine.meaning: Creatinine is a muscle waste product filtered by kidneys. High levels suggest kidney issues.
creatinine.normal_meaning: Your creatinine is normal — kidneys are filtering well.

uric_acid.meaning: Uric acid is a waste from purine breakdown. High levels cause gout.
uric_acid.normal_meaning: Your uric acid is normal — low gout risk.

sodium.meaning: Sodium regulates fluid balance and nerve function.

potassium.meaning: Potassium is critical for heart and muscle function.

chloride.meaning: Chloride helps maintain fluid and acid-base balance.

calcium.meaning: Calcium is essential for bones, nerves, and muscles.

phosphorus.meaning: Phosphorus works with calcium for bone health.

magnesium.meaning: Magnesium is important for muscle and nerve function.

egfr.meaning: eGFR estimates how well kidneys filter blood. Below 60 indicates kidney disease.
egfr.normal_meaning: Your kidney filtration rate is normal.

total_cholesterol.meaning: Total cholesterol measures all cholesterol in blood.
total_cholesterol.normal_meaning: Your cholesterol is in healthy range.

hdl.meaning: HDL is 'good' cholesterol — higher is better for heart health.
hdl.normal_meaning: Your HDL (good cholesterol) is in healthy range.

ldl.meaning: LDL is 'bad' cholesterol — high levels increase heart disease risk.
ldl.normal_meaning: Your LDL (bad cholesterol) is in healthy range.

triglycerides.meaning: Triglycerides are fat in blood. High levels increase heart disease risk.
triglycerides.normal_meaning: Your triglycerides are in healthy range.

cholesterol_hdl_ratio.meaning: This ratio assesses heart disease risk — lower is better.

fasting_glucose.meaning: Fasting glucose measures blood sugar after 8+ hours without eating.
fasting_glucose.normal_meaning: Your fasting blood sugar is normal — no diabetes sign.

pp_glucose.meaning: PP glucose measures blood sugar 2 hours after eating.
pp_glucose.normal_meaning: Your post-meal blood sugar is normal.

random_glucose.meaning: Random glucose can be checked any time. High values may indicate diabetes.
random_glucose.normal_meaning: Your random blood sugar is normal.

hba1c.meaning: HbA1c shows average blood sugar over 2-3 months. Above 6.5% indicates diabetes.
hba1c.normal_meaning: Your HbA1c is normal — good long-term sugar control.

fasting_insulin.meaning: Fasting insulin measures hormone that controls blood sugar.

tsh.meaning: TSH controls thyroid hormone production. High TSH suggests underactive thyroid.
tsh.normal_meaning: Your TSH is normal — thyroid function looks good.

t3.meaning: T3 is an active thyroid hormone.

t4.meaning: T4 is the main thyroid hormone.

free_t3.meaning: Free T3 is the active, unbound form of T3.

free_t4.meaning: Free T4 is the active, unbound form of thyroxine.

anti_tpo.meaning: Anti-TPO antibodies indicate autoimmune thyroid disease.

serum_iron.meaning: Serum iron measures iron in blood for hemoglobin production.

tibc.meaning: TIBC measures blood's capacity to bind iron.

ferritin.meaning: Ferritin is stored iron. Low levels indicate iron deficiency.

transferrin_saturation.meaning: Transferrin saturation shows how much iron is bound to transferrin.

vitamin_d.meaning: Vitamin D is essential for bone health and immunity.
vitamin_d.normal_meaning: Your Vitamin D level is sufficient.

vitamin_b12.meaning: B12 is essential for nerve function and red cell production.

folate.meaning: Folate is essential for cell division and preventing birth defects.

troponin_i.meaning: Troponin I is released when heart muscle is damaged. Elevated levels suggest heart attack.

troponin_t.meaning: Troponin T is a marker of heart muscle injury.

ck_mb.meaning: CK-MB is a heart-specific enzyme. Elevated in heart muscle damage.

bnp.meaning: BNP is released when heart is stressed. High levels indicate heart failure.
bnp.normal_meaning: Your BNP is normal — no heart failure signs.

nt_pro_bnp.meaning: NT-proBNP is a heart failure marker.

cpk.meaning: CPK is an enzyme from muscles. High levels indicate muscle damage.

crp.meaning: CRP indicates inflammation in the body.

hs_crp.meaning: hs-CRP is a sensitive marker for cardiovascular inflammation risk.
hs_crp.normal_meaning: Your cardiovascular inflammation risk is low.

homocysteine.meaning: High homocysteine increases heart disease and stroke risk.

pt.meaning: PT measures blood clotting time. Prolonged PT indicates bleeding risk.

inr.meaning: INR standardizes PT for monitoring blood thinners.

fibrinogen.meaning: Fibrinogen is a clotting protein made by liver.

d_dimer.meaning: D-Dimer indicates blood clot breakdown. High levels suggest clotting activity.
d_dimer.normal_meaning: No evidence of abnormal blood clotting.

urine_protein.meaning: Protein in urine may indicate kidney damage.

urine_glucose.meaning: Glucose in urine suggests high blood sugar.
urine_glucose.normal_meaning: No glucose in urine — normal finding.

urine_ketones.meaning: Ketones in urine indicate fat breakdown for energy.
urine_ketones.normal_meaning: No ketones in urine — normal finding.

urine_blood.meaning: Blood in urine needs investigation — may indicate kidney or bladder issues.

urine_ph.meaning: Urine pH indicates acidity or alkalinity of urine.

microalbumin.meaning: Microalbumin detects early kidney damage in diabetes.

testosterone.meaning: Testosterone is the primary male sex hormone.
testosterone.normal_meaning: Your testosterone is in normal range.

estradiol.meaning: Estradiol is the main estrogen hormone.

progesterone.meaning: Progesterone supports pregnancy and menstrual cycle.

prolactin.meaning: Prolactin stimulates milk production. High levels may affect fertility.

lh.meaning: LH triggers ovulation and testosterone production.

cortisol.meaning: Cortisol is the stress hormone made by adrenal glands.

amh.meaning: AMH indicates ovarian reserve — egg supply remaining.

beta_hcg.meaning: Beta hCG confirms pregnancy. Levels rise rapidly in early pregnancy.

psa.meaning: PSA screens for prostate issues including cancer.

cea.meaning: CEA is a tumor marker, especially for colorectal cancer.

afp.meaning: AFP is a tumor marker for liver cancer and germ cell tumors.

ca_125.meaning: CA-125 is a marker for ovarian cancer.

ca_19_9.meaning: CA 19-9 is a marker for pancreatic and GI cancers.

amylase.meaning: Amylase is a pancreatic enzyme. High levels indicate pancreatitis.

lipase.meaning: Lipase is a pancreatic enzyme. More specific for pancreatitis than amylase.

procalcitonin.meaning: Procalcitonin rises specifically in bacterial infections and sepsis.

ana.meaning: ANA screens for autoimmune diseases like lupus.
ana.normal_meaning: ANA negative — no autoimmune marker detected.

rheumatoid_factor.meaning: RF is elevated in rheumatoid arthritis.

anti_ccp.meaning: Anti-CCP is highly specific for rheumatoid arthritis.

hbsag.normal_meaning: Hepatitis B surface antigen negative — no active infection.

anti_hcv.meaning: Anti-HCV indicates exposure to hepatitis C.
anti_hcv.normal_meaning: Hepatitis C antibody negative — no exposure detected.

hiv.meaning: HIV test screens for HIV infection.

dengue_ns1.normal_meaning: Dengue NS1 negative — no active early dengue infection.

malaria_antigen.normal_meaning: Malaria antigen negative — no malaria detected.

widal_o.meaning: Widal O tests for typhoid fever antibodies.

widal_h.meaning: Widal H tests for typhoid fever antibodies.

blood_group.meaning: Blood group identifies your ABO and Rh type.

g6pd.meaning: G6PD deficiency can cause hemolytic anemia with certain triggers.
g6pd.normal_meaning: Your G6PD enzyme level is normal.

stool_occult_blood.meaning: Detects hidden blood in stool — screens for GI bleeding or colon cancer.
stool_occult_blood.normal_meaning: No occult blood detected in stool.
